name: SocialCast
description: Unified social media posting platform — connect accounts across 9 platforms and publish everywhere at once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Api_key
credential_fields.description: SocialCast API Key (from your SocialCast dashboard under API Keys)

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all connected social media accounts for the project. Optionally filter by platform or status. Accounts with status 'active' are fully configured and ready to post — do NOT suggest setup steps for active accounts. The platform_metadata field contains internal IDs used by the system (pageId, instagramAccountId, etc.) and should not be interpreted as incomplete setup.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get details of a specific connected social media account by ID.

tools.name: create_post
tools.description:
Create and publish a post to one or more connected social media platforms simultaneously. Supports text, images, videos, and links.

Media capabilities per platform:
- Instagram: Single image, single video (Reel), or CAROUSEL (2-10 images/videos mixed). Pass multiple items in media_urls for carousel.
- Facebook: Text, single image, MULTI-PHOTO (2+ images posted as album), single video, or link post.
- Twitter/X: Text with up to 4 media attachments (images, GIFs, or 1 video). Media is uploaded automatically.
- TikTok: Single video or PHOTO CAROUSEL (up to 35 images). Use overrides for privacy, comments, music.
- YouTube: Single video upload with title, description, tags, privacy.
- Pinterest: Single image with title, description, board, and link.
- Reddit: Text (self) or link post to a subreddit.
- LinkedIn: Text post with optional visibility setting.
- Telegram: Text or single image with optional parse mode.

To schedule a post for later, set scheduled_for to an ISO 8601 timestamp and optionally timezone (e.g., 'America/New_York'). IMPORTANT: Each call only accepts a single scheduled_for time that applies to ALL account_ids in that call. To schedule the same content at different times for different platforms (e.g., Instagram at 9am and Twitter at 12pm), you MUST make separate create_post calls — one per unique scheduled time, each with only the account_ids for that time slot.

media_urls.description: Media attachments. Pass multiple images for carousel/album posts (Instagram up to 10, Facebook unlimited, TikTok up to 35). Each item needs url, type (image/video), and optional alt_text.

url.description: Public URL of the media file

link_url.description: External link to include in the post

account_ids.description: Array of connected account IDs to publish to (at least 1 required)

scheduled_for.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to schedule the post for future publishing (e.g., '2025-12-25T10:00:00Z'). If omitted, the post is published immediately.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the scheduled time (e.g., 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London'). Defaults to UTC if omitted. Only used when scheduled_for is set.

platform_overrides.description: Per-platform overrides keyed by platform name. Only include platforms you want to customize. Available fields per platform: youtube: {title, description, tags (array), privacyStatus (public/unlisted/private), categoryId}. reddit: {title, subreddit, text, nsfw}. pinterest: {title, description, board_id}. tiktok: {title (photo posts only, max 90 chars), text (caption/description, falls back to main post text), privacyLevel (PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE/MUTUAL_FOLLOW_FRIENDS/FOLLOWER_OF_CREATOR/SELF_ONLY), disableComment (bool), autoAddMusic (bool, photo posts only)}. linkedin: {text, visibility}. facebook: {text, title (video only)}. twitter: {text}. instagram: {text}. telegram: {text, chatId, parseMode}. All fields are optional — omitted fields fall back to the main post text.

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: List published social posts with filtering and pagination. Returns post content, status, and per-platform results.

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Get a specific post with full per-platform results including platform post URLs, statuses, and errors.

tools.name: update_post
tools.description: Update a post's text and platform-specific settings, then sync changes to platforms that support editing (Facebook, YouTube, Telegram). For YouTube: pass platform_overrides.youtube with title, description, tags, privacyStatus. For scheduled/failed posts: updates are saved locally for the next publish attempt. Other platforms will be skipped.

platform_overrides.description: Per-platform overrides. youtube: {title, description, tags (array), privacyStatus, categoryId}. tiktok: {title, text, privacyLevel, disableComment, autoAddMusic}. Other platforms use the main text field.

tools.name: delete_post
tools.description: Delete a post record and attempt to remove it from platforms that support deletion (Facebook, YouTube, Pinterest, Telegram). Other platforms' posts will remain live.

tools.name: reschedule_post
tools.description: Reschedule a previously scheduled post to a new date/time. The post must be in 'scheduled' status. Updates the scheduled job and post record.

scheduled_for.description: New ISO 8601 timestamp for the post (e.g., '2025-12-25T10:00:00Z')

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the scheduled time (e.g., 'America/New_York'). Defaults to UTC if omitted.

tools.name: cancel_scheduled_post
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled post. The post must be in 'scheduled' status. The post will be moved back to 'draft' status and the scheduled job will be removed.

tools.name: retry_post
tools.description: Retry publishing a failed or partially failed post. Re-publishes only to the platforms that failed, keeping existing successful results intact. The post must be in 'failed' or 'partial' status.

tools.name: get_post_analytics
tools.description: Fetch analytics and engagement metrics for a published post across all platforms. Returns impressions, reach, likes, comments, shares, views, saves, clicks, quotes, and bookmarks where available. Supported: Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, TikTok, Pinterest, Twitter/X. No analytics API: LinkedIn, Reddit, Telegram.

id.description: Post ID to get analytics for

tools.name: account_insights
tools.description: Get page-level insights and historical stats for a connected social account. Returns follower growth, reach, impressions, engagement metrics, and top content over a date range. Supported: Instagram (reach, followers, engagement, interactions), Facebook (page impressions, reach, engagement, fans), YouTube (subscribers, views, watch time), TikTok (followers, views, likes, shares), Twitter/X (followers, following, tweet count + recent tweet engagement), Pinterest (impressions, engagement, pin clicks, outbound clicks, saves + top pins). Unsupported: LinkedIn, Reddit, Telegram.

id.description: Social account ID to get insights for

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to 7 days ago)

end_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to today)

tools.name: list_inbox
tools.description: List social inbox items — comments, replies, and DMs received on your connected accounts. Filter by platform, account, status, or type. Returns items sorted by most recent first with unread count.

type.description: Filter by item type (comment, reply to comment, or DM)

tools.name: reply_inbox
tools.description: Reply to a comment on a social post, or send a private DM to the commenter via Messenger. Set private_reply=true to send as a DM instead of a public comment reply. Private replies use the Messenger Platform and are delivered to the commenter's inbox.

social_account_id.description: Social account ID to reply from

comment_id.description: Comment ID to reply to (for public reply or private DM to commenter)

post_id.description: Post ID for new top-level comment (if no comment_id)

inbox_item_id.description: Optional: inbox record ID to mark as replied

private_reply.description: If true, send as a private DM via Messenger instead of a public comment reply

tools.name: update_inbox
tools.description: Update the status of inbox items — mark as read, replied, or archived. Supports single item, bulk IDs, or mark-all-read for an account.

id.description: Single inbox item ID to update

ids.description: Array of inbox item IDs to bulk update

mark_all_read.description: If true, mark all items as read (optionally filtered by social_account_id)

social_account_id.description: Filter for mark_all_read — only mark items from this account

events.name: social.comment.received
events.description: New comment received on a post

events.name: social.comment.deleted
events.description: A comment was removed from a post

credential_group.name: SocialCast
credential_group.description: One key, many workspaces. Account keys list every workspace you own; workspace keys are scoped to one.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Account API Key
credential_fields.description: Lists every workspace. SocialCast issues these under Dashboard → API Keys → Account.
